description: Free frame: no FR parity and no holonomy attachment; default integer twist is 0.
FR parity only: n_core restricted to odd integers, no sign/holonomy center; lowest odd pair is ±1.
Canonical core cycle Omega*T=2π exists locally but is not globally attached; no n_core theorem.
FR odd + global core-cycle attachment + matter chirality; center=+1.
FR odd + global core-cycle attachment + antimatter chirality; center=-1.
Passive transit model with non-integer holonomy center; audit should not produce pq+1 exactly.
Passive transit plus FR odd restriction; still selects the nearest odd integer, typically 3, not 1.
Perturbed phase-lock: center=1+slope*(q-q_ref); tests whether exact q-independent attachment is required.
Deterministic noise-like perturbation around center=+1; tests stability margin but not exact Canon derivation.
